title: deparia otomasui
side_effects: Deparia otomasui can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. In rare cases, excessive consumption can lead to liver damage and kidney strain, which may result in symptoms like fatigue and dark urine. The improper use of Deparia otomasui may also cause an imbalance in blood sugar levels, potentially leading to hypoglycemia or hyperglycemia. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
